name: Gill Runt
description: Gill Runt is one of the four sidekicks in Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure. He is the miniature version of Gill Grunt, eventually becoming a Mini Skylander in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography:
Within the Skylands, a realm of infinite possibilities, there is in fact an alternate reality known as the Skylands Miniverse. Everything there is smaller, including the Skylanders. The Skylanders Sidekicks come from that Miniverse and have traveled to the Skylands to meet their regular-sized alter egos and tag along with them on adventures.

The Skylander Minis started off as regular 'Sidekicks', assisting the Skylanders on many exciting adventures. And what they lacked in size they more than made up for in courage. Ultimately determined to become full-fledged heroes, they trained at the Skylands Academy - honing their powers and skills until they were ready. Now, they stand side by side with their full grown counterparts, ready to defend Skylands against Kaos and his evil minions.
personality: Gill Runt is the best friend anyone could ever have. He is trustworthy and loyal and he gets the job done.

story.content: Gill Runt is the best friend anyone could ever have. He is trustworthy and loyal and he gets the job done.

Within the Skylands, a realm of infinite possibilities, there is in fact an alternate reality known as the Skylands Miniverse. Everything there is smaller, including the Skylanders. The Skylanders Sidekicks come from that Miniverse and have traveled to the Skylands to meet their regular-sized alter egos and tag along with them on adventures.

The Skylander Minis started off as regular 'Sidekicks', assisting the Skylanders on many exciting adventures. And what they lacked in size they more than made up for in courage. Ultimately determined to become full-fledged heroes, they trained at the Skylands Academy - honing their powers and skills until they were ready. trivia: Gill Runt is the miniature version of Gill Grunt.
He originates from the Skylands Miniverse, where everything is smaller.
His English voice actor is Darin De Paul.
Gill Runt is described as being a trustworthy and loyal friend who gets the job done.
Gill Runt started as a Sidekick before training at the Skylands Academy to become a full-fledged hero as a Mini Skylander.

trailers.name: Meet the Mini Skylanders Gill Runt

gameplay: Gill Runt initially appeared as a Sidekick in the first three Skylanders games, functioning as a non-playable companion that followed the player. In Skylanders: Trap Team, he was re-released as a 'Mini', making him a fully playable Skylander with the same move pool as Gill Grunt, including the Harpoon Gun, Water Cannon, and his Jetpack abilities.

basic.name: Water Cannon
basic.content: Blasts enemies with a powerful stream of water.

basic_upgrades.name: Boiling Water Hose
basic_upgrades.content: Spray boiling water to damage enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Water Jet Pack
basic_upgrades.content: Allows for quick movement and tactical positioning.

soulgems.name: Anchor Cannon
soulgems.content: Launch heavy anchors at enemies for massive damage.
